tips_en: Start with Paper 3 on DiT interpretability—its finding that chat-template tokens act as implicit semantic registers (and attention sinks) is the most intellectually surprising and reveals a bimodal depth organization in text-to-image generation, plus it offers a practical 20% FLOP reduction. This naturally connects to Paper 1, which also operates on diffusion transformers but focuses on inference acceleration; reading Paper 3 first may inform how you think about efficiency in Paper 1's distilled rendering pipeline. Paper 2 on temporal grounding is strong but more self-contained, so it can be read afterward for its elegant Wasserstein-based reward design.
tips_zh: 建议先读第三篇关于DiT可解释性的论文——它发现对话模板中的结构性token充当隐式语义寄存器（同时也是注意力汇聚点），这一发现最具颠覆性，揭示了文生图模型中的双峰深度组织结构，并提供了20%的FLOPs削减方案。这与第一篇（同样基于扩散Transformer、同样关注推理加速）存在架构上的天然联系，先读第三篇有助于理解第一篇蒸馏渲染管线中的效率设计思路。第二篇关于时序定位的工作相对独立，其优雅的Wasserstein奖励设计可以在之后阅读。
